page_metadata.biotools__summary: ProteinVolume (PV) is a Java program that calculates the components of the solvent-excluded (geometric) volume of a protein: van der Waals and void volume.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ProteinVolume (PV) is a Java program that calculates the components of the solvent-excluded (geometric) volume of a protein: van der Waals and void volume.
